entities.name: Careerspan

entities.name: Defensible talent-matching

entities.name: Employer monetization model
entities.context: Strategy to stop charging job seekers and monetize through employers and eventually VCs for high-quality matching and talent funnels

entities.name: Acquisition outcome
entities.context: Strategic goal to maintain an attractive acquisition profile while moving toward profitability

entities.name: Revenue hygiene
entities.context: Early-stage priority to set up invoicing and revenue systems correctly to avoid margin loss or messy systems

entities.name: Bootstrap to profitability
entities.context: Strategy to avoid dependence on new venture capital and move toward profitability

relationships.context: Co-founder and CEO-type leader running the company with a skeleton team
